valid_meta.principle: When a dependency cycle crosses architecture layers, remove the outward dependency through a port and wire the concrete adapter at the edge.
When reviewing App Store findings, correct overclaims by re-checking cited files and downgrading unsupported blockers instead of preserving severe but false risks.
When remediating ASI tool and policy gaps, patch the enforcement path itself: fail closed before tool execution, validate names and arguments deterministically, and prove denied cases with tests.
When a bypass crashes, debug the side effects of the skipped branch and repair with the smallest evidence-backed edit instead of broad NOPs.
When Aspire reports missing service-discovery variables, correct AppHost resource relationships and rerun the same failing command before changing workload code.
Implement tracing as an additive, centralized setup that uses environment variables for credentials and preserves existing business logic.
Run ASI compliance as an evidence-first code audit across all ten risks, scoring only controls that are enforced before agent action and citing concrete files for every pass or gap.
Use Arize trace and evaluation evidence to optimize the deployed LLM prompt, preserving runtime variables and validating with experiment metrics.
Modal accessibility requires naming, focus entry, focus containment, dismissal, and focus return as a single behavior set.
Before making Arize links, classify the resource and inventory the exact identifiers needed so missing project, time, or base64 path IDs are caught early.
Deterministic integrity manifests should hash reviewed source files in stable order, exclude generated artifacts, and verify the recorded chain before promotion.
Skip or redirect ADR work for routine maintenance, but capture the rationale when the request is a near miss.
Accessibility audit closure must distinguish code-owned fixes from content-owned blockers.
Build attack trees from a clear attacker goal, preserving OR alternatives and AND dependencies before ranking leaves.
Verify Arize evaluator tasks from real data: resolve IDs, sample spans or runs, map every template variable, and treat run status as evidence.
Review dataset automation by grounding findings in concrete ax commands, schema handling, and export-count evidence rather than broad style preferences.
Review GraphQL API designs by grounding findings in schema shape, resolver behavior, pagination contracts, mutation payloads, and N plus one evidence.
Verification must distinguish local app success from Arize-side delivery failures, including missing project names, flush behavior, and credential or space mismatches.
Troubleshoot and update Arize AI integrations by acting on the requested ax command first, then verifying with get/list output and preserving secrets through environment variables.
Synthesize governance reviews around pre-flight intent checks, tool-level enforcement, trust signals, and audit evidence, separating verified behavior from assumptions.
Determine application stack and Azure hosting from evidence first, then choose App Insights instrumentation path that matches the hosting model and avoids unsupported configuration.
